name: GmailConnector
description: Connects to Google Gmail via OAuth2 to ingest, manage, and delete email messages from a user's mailbox into Shielva.

install_fields.label: OAuth Client ID
install_fields.help: Google OAuth2 Client ID from the GCP Console (APIs & Services > Credentials).

install_fields.label: OAuth Client Secret
install_fields.help: Google OAuth2 Client Secret from the GCP Console (APIs & Services > Credentials).

install_fields.label: OAuth Scopes
install_fields.help: Space-separated OAuth scopes. Defaults to 'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/gmail.modify https://mail.google.com/' which enables read, trash, label, and permanent delete operations.

install_fields.label: Authorization URL
install_fields.help: Override the OAuth2 authorization endpoint. Defaults to 'https://accounts.google.com/o/oauth2/v2/auth'.

install_fields.label: Token URL
install_fields.help: Override the OAuth2 token endpoint. Defaults to 'https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token'.

install_fields.label: Base API URL
install_fields.help: Override the Gmail API base URL. Defaults to 'https://gmail.googleapis.com'.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (quota units/min)
install_fields.help: Maximum Gmail API quota units per minute. Leave blank to use the Google-imposed default.

install_fields.label: Pagination Type
install_fields.help: Pagination strategy identifier. Defaults to 'page_token' (Gmail's nextPageToken mechanism).

install_fields.label: API Version
install_fields.help: Gmail API version to use. Defaults to 'v1'.

methods.name: install
methods.description: Validate and persist the connector configuration (client_id, client_secret, and optional fields). Returns a ConnectorStatus with PENDING auth status and a prompt to authorize.

methods.name: authorize
methods.description: Exchange an OAuth2 authorization code for access and refresh tokens. Called after the user completes the OAuth2 consent screen.

methods.name: health_check
methods.description: Verify token validity by calling users.getProfile. Returns HEALTHY+CONNECTED on success, UNHEALTHY+TOKEN_EXPIRED on auth error.

methods.name: sync
methods.description: Fetch and ingest Gmail messages. Supports full sync (all messages) and incremental sync (messages after a given datetime via after: query filter).

methods.name: list_email
methods.description: Fetch all matching email metadata with full auto-pagination. Calls execute_list_messages() for stubs then execute_get_message() per message. Returns a flat list of raw message dicts.

methods.name: on_token_refresh
methods.description: Refresh the OAuth2 access token using the stored refresh_token. Sole owner of token-refresh logic — called automatically by ensure_token() when the token is expired.

methods.name: read_email
methods.description: Fetch a single email message by ID using users.messages.get. Supports format='metadata' or 'full'. Returns the raw message resource dict.

methods.name: add_email
methods.description: Import an RFC 2822 message (base64url-encoded) into the mailbox using users.messages.import. Returns the created message resource.

methods.name: list_message
methods.description: Fetch a single page of message stubs (id, threadId) from Gmail. Returns the raw API response including nextPageToken for caller-controlled pagination.

methods.name: update_email
methods.description: Modify label membership of an email message using users.messages.modify. Accepts separate add_label_ids and remove_label_ids lists.

methods.name: label_email
methods.description: Apply one or more label IDs to an email message (additive — existing labels are preserved). Delegates to execute_modify_message() with an empty remove_label_ids list.

methods.name: trash_email
methods.description: Move an email to Trash (reversible) using users.messages.trash. Requires gmail.modify scope. Returns the full message resource with TRASH in labelIds.

methods.name: delete_email
methods.description: Permanently delete a single email (irreversible) using users.messages.delete. Requires https://mail.google.com/ scope. Emits a WARN-level audit log entry.

methods.name: remove_email
methods.description: Alias for delete_email — permanently deletes a single email. Provided for API consistency.

methods.name: batch_delete_emails
methods.description: Permanently delete a batch of emails in a single API call using users.messages.batchDelete. Requires https://mail.google.com/ scope. Maximum 1000 IDs per call. Emits a WARN-level audit log entry.
